_comment: Single source of truth for per-pack participant roles — key, label, icon, color, and invite-page copy. The backend (api/index.js) reads this directly for email/notification/event-log role labels (pack-agnostic — it never hardcodes role keys). Frontend workflow pack files (ui/src/lib/workflowPacks/*.js) import this same file as their `roles` export, and DealRoomPage/CommentsPanel look up role metadata scoped by packId instead of a flat cross-pack dict, so role keys can safely differ in meaning across packs (e.g. `lender` means something different in cre_acquisition vs business_acquisition).

roles.label: Owner / Borrower
roles.headline: Welcome to your deal room
roles.subtext: As the property owner, you have a full view of all parties, documents, compliance status, and deal progress. Share the role-specific links below to invite each party.

roles.label: Lender / Underwriter
roles.headline: You've been invited to review this deal
roles.subtext: As a lender, you have access to the financial package, risk score, compliance status, and AI-analyzed documents.

roles.label: Inspector
roles.headline: You've been invited to submit your report
roles.subtext: As the inspector, upload your inspection report in the checklist above — findings are AI-structured and shared with the lender automatically.

roles.label: Insurance Broker
roles.headline: You've been invited to provide insurance coverage
roles.subtext: Upload the insurance certificate in the checklist above. Coverage gaps and expiration dates are tracked automatically for the lender.

roles.label: Attorney
roles.headline: You've been invited to review the legal package
roles.subtext: Review the legal structure documentation, title history, and compliance checklist for this property. Legal documents are uploaded in the checklist above.

roles.label: Investor
roles.headline: You've been invited to review this investment
roles.subtext: As an investor, you have access to the Investment Readiness Report, financial performance data, and status.

roles.label: Servicer
roles.headline: You've been invited to this servicing deal
roles.subtext: As the servicer, you have access to draw management, borrower financials, escrow status, and covenant tracking.

roles.label: Franchisor / Brand
roles.headline: You've been invited to review this hotel deal room
roles.subtext: As the franchisor representative, you can review the Property Improvement Plan, brand standards compliance, and flag any requirements before deal close.

roles.label: Buyer
roles.headline: Welcome to your deal room
roles.subtext: As the buyer, you have a full view of all parties, documents, and deal progress. Share the role-specific links below to invite your advisors and the seller.

roles.label: Seller
roles.headline: You've been invited to this deal room
roles.subtext: As the seller, upload your financial statements and disclosures in the checklist above, and track the buyer's progress toward closing.

roles.label: CPA / Accountant
roles.inviteAction: review the quality of earnings report
roles.headline: You've been invited to review the financials
roles.subtext: As the CPA, review the financial statements, tax returns, and quality of earnings report uploaded in the checklist above.

roles.label: Legal Counsel
roles.headline: You've been invited to review the legal package
roles.subtext: As legal counsel, review the purchase agreement and disclosure schedule uploaded in the checklist above.

roles.label: Lender
roles.headline: You've been invited to review the financing package
roles.subtext: As the lender, review the financial statements and quality of earnings report uploaded in the checklist above to evaluate financing.

roles.label: M&A Broker
roles.headline: You've been invited to coordinate this deal
roles.subtext: As the M&A broker, you have visibility across all deal parties. Track document status and share role-scoped links with each party.

roles.label: Founder / CEO
roles.headline: Welcome to your deal room
roles.subtext: As the founder, you have a full view of all parties, documents, and round progress. Share the role-specific links below to invite your investor, counsel, and auditor.

roles.label: Investor
roles.inviteAction: review the data room and term sheet
roles.headline: You've been invited to review this round
roles.subtext: As the investor, review the term sheet, financials, and cap table uploaded in the checklist above to evaluate this investment.

roles.label: Legal Counsel
roles.headline: You've been invited to review the legal package
roles.subtext: As legal counsel, prepare and review the stock purchase agreement and disclosure schedule uploaded in the checklist above.

roles.label: Auditor
roles.headline: You've been invited to review the financials
roles.subtext: As the auditor, upload the audited financial statements in the checklist above for the investor's review.

roles.label: Placement Agent
roles.headline: You've been invited to coordinate this round
roles.subtext: As the placement agent, you have visibility across all parties. Track document status and share role-scoped links with each party.
